summary: TWO_COLUMN Casorati–Weierstrass for f(z)=e^(1/z) at essential singularity z=0. LEFT: ComplexPlane with always_redraw yellow shrinking circle of radius r on ValueTracker r_tr (0.6→0.05). RIGHT: ComplexPlane with always_redraw ORANGE image cloud of 480 points from |z|=r, 0.7r, 0.4r mapped through e^(1/z); cloud visibly densifies in ℂ as r→0.
